script: |
  $projectPath = Get-ChildItem -Path "$(Build.SourcesDirectory)" -Recurse -Filter "WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.AzureFunctions.csproj" |
    Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty FullName

  Write-Host "Publishing project:"
  Write-Host $projectPath
  Write-Host "Project exists:"
  Write-Host (Test-Path $projectPath)

  if (-not $projectPath) {
    throw "Azure Functions csproj not found."
  }

  dotnet publish $projectPath `
    --configuration ${{ parameters.buildConfiguration }} `
    --framework net8.0 `
    --output "$(Build.ArtifactStagingDirectory)"
